span.p:
일반 CI / 로컬 기본 검증
go test ./...

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
privileged Linux +
reachable disposable NFS exports?

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
통합 skeleton은 t.Skip
NFS 검증은 UNVERIFIED로 보고

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
FVS_TEST_* 입력 준비
NFS host/export/subpath/verify roots

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
private disposable verify roots
owner-only, no symlink components

display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
수동 runbook 실행
sudo env -i + select 0 one-row.csv

selector-launched sync child
mount namespace sandbox

증거 수집
stdout/stderr, findmnt, checksum, readlink, cleanup
